n: Hubo Clayhanger and His Tales of Wonder

steps.t: Hubo Clayhanger's home can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should travel to Hubo Clayhanger's home to further discuss your adventures over a …
Hubo Clayhanger's home can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should peruse some of Hubo Clayhanger's books while he prepares tea.
Hubo Clayhanger's home can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should have a cup of tea with Hubo Clayhanger.
Hubo Clayhanger's home can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should talk to Hubo Clayhanger about his unfinished book.
